channel.title: Design on RAW-TECH
channel.description: Recent content in Design on RAW-TECH

item.title: The Average Person Doesn't Exist
item.description: The US Air Force designed a cockpit for the average pilot and found that zero pilots fit. The problem wasn't the measurement. It was the concept.

item.title: Every Map Is a Compromise
item.description: You can't flatten a sphere without lying about something. The question is what you choose to distort.
